threats.question: Does the component validate input safely before processing requests?
threats.typical_threat: An attacker submits crafted payloads that manipulate server-side logic through insufficient input validation.

threats.question: Does the component expose sensitive configuration or tenant data to unauthorised users?
threats.typical_threat: An attacker accesses logs or APIs that reveal secrets or customer information due to weak access controls.

threats.question: Can the component be spoofed by an attacker pretending to be a trusted caller?
threats.typical_threat: An attacker impersonates an internal service and submits requests that the system trusts without sufficient verification.
